summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Hub (index.html), Challenge station, and other stations (Listening, Funny Corner, Grammar). All features tested and working correctly. Leaderboard system with shareable codes verified.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html is 720 lines - acceptable size for a hub page
pit-score.js is well-structured with all required functions for leaderboard system
All stations have proper data-testid attributes for testing
localStorage persistence works correctly across pages
test_credentials: N/A - no authentication required. Enter any name to start.
seed_data_creation: N/A - all data is embedded in HTML files
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a pure HTML/CSS/JS static site served via React CRA dev server. No backend APIs. All data is embedded in the HTML files and persisted in localStorage. Preview URL: https://github-debug-2.preview.emergentagent.com

hub_index_html.login_flow: PASS - Enter name, click ENTER THE PIT, dashboard shows correctly
hub_index_html.station_cards_visible: PASS - All 9 stations visible (Vocabulary, Writing, Reading, Speaking, Listening, Funny Corner, Games, Challenge, Grammar)
hub_index_html.tab_navigation: PASS - Stations/Leaderboard/Achievements tabs switch views correctly
hub_index_html.leaderboard_tab: PASS - Shows player entry, Generate Code button works, Import section visible
hub_index_html.achievements_tab: PASS - Shows 9 achievement badges (0/9 unlocked initially)
hub_index_html.score_banner: PASS - Shows total score (0), sessions (0), badges (0), last active date

challenge_station.login_screen: PASS - Shows 4 mode descriptions (Karaoke, Tongue Twisters, Who Am I, Multi-Skill Blitz)
challenge_station.mode_tabs: PASS - 4 mode tabs work and switch content correctly
challenge_station.karaoke_mode: PASS - Shows lyrics, LISTEN/MIC/SUBMIT buttons visible and functional
challenge_station.tongue_twisters_mode: PASS - Shows blurred text, LISTEN/REVEAL buttons, difficulty stars
challenge_station.who_am_i_mode: PASS - Shows clues, 4 answer options, More Clues button
challenge_station.multi_skill_blitz_mode: PASS - Shows timer bar, skill badge, timed questions with 4 options
challenge_station.menu_button: PASS - onclick='location.href="../index.html"' navigates back to hub
challenge_station.hud_elements: PASS - Score, Streak, Challenges counters visible
challenge_station.progress_sidebar: PASS - Correct count, Best Streak, Total Points visible

listening_station.player_box: PASS - PLAY/REPLAY buttons, speed controls visible
listening_station.menu_button: PASS - MENU button navigates to hub

funny_corner_station.mode_tabs: PASS - 4 modes (Guess the Meaning, Match Up, Situation, Listen & Choose)
funny_corner_station.idiom_card: PASS - Idiom text and LISTEN button visible
funny_corner_station.menu_button: PASS - MENU button navigates to hub

grammar_station.topics_grid: PASS - 6 grammar topics visible (To Be, Pronouns, Present Simple & Continuous, Question Words, Past Simple, Comparatives & Superlatives)
grammar_station.quiz_view: PASS - Clicking topic shows quiz with questions and options
grammar_station.menu_button: PASS - MENU button navigates to hub

pit_score_js.all_methods_exist: PASS - getPlayer, savePlayer, setName, addScore, updateStation, getLeaderboard, saveToLeaderboard, exportCode, importCode, checkAchievements, reset
pit_score_js.challenge_in_schema: PASS - challenge station included in player.stations with score, sessions, completed fields
pit_score_js.all_stations_in_schema: PASS - vocabulary, writing, reading, grammar, listening, speaking, games, funnycorner, challenge
pit_score_js.export_code: PASS - Generates valid base64 encoded JSON with name, score, stations, achievements, date
pit_score_js.import_code: PASS - Successfully imports code and adds to leaderboard
pit_score_js.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Player data persists across page navigation

navigation.hub_to_challenge: PASS - Clicking Challenge card navigates to /stations/challenge.html
navigation.challenge_to_hub: PASS - MENU button navigates back to ../index.html
navigation.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Player name auto-fills from localStorage when returning to stations
